options.name: -extraction
options.description: Checks that all data required for extraction are correct

options.name: -globalNet
options.description: After init_design or restoreDesign, will do the same checks as checkDesign -powerGround

options.name: -library
options.description: After init_design or restoreDesign, will do the same checks as checkDesign -physicalLibrary -timingLibrary

options.name: -mgrid
options.description: Checks that geometries are on the manufacturing grid

options.name: -netlist
options.description: After reading in the netlist, will do the same checks as checkDesign -netlist

options.name: -route
options.description: Checks whether power and ground pins are connected to power and ground nets before power routing

options.name: -tapeOut
options.description: When reading the netlist will error out if there are undefined instances or ports (rather than create black_boxes or empty modules)

options.name: -timingGraph
options.description: Checks library cells for timing information

options.name: -vcellnetlist
options.description: Checks for tie-high and tie-low output pins when reading the Verilog netlist

options.name: -quiet
options.description: Displays the current settings in Tcl list format only

options.name: -nonDefault
options.description: Displays the current settings which are not default settings
